title: Baablu's Natural Disasters
description: Randomly makes natural disasters happen to your world
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/HydP8HJ1JxM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Baablu's Natural Disasters mod adds eight disasters that can strike your world:

- Earthquakes: The earth shakes, and lava-filled chasms open around you.
- Lightning Storms: Clouds cover the sky, and lightning falls upon the land.
- Meteors: Meteors fall from space, aimed directly at you.
- Nukes: If you see the mushroom cloud rising, run.
- Sinkholes: A giant circular hole appears in the ground without warning.
- Tornadoes: The strength of the wind in these throws blocks, mobs, and players around _hard_.
- Tsunamis: A huge wave washes everything away. Don't get caught in the current!
- Zombie Apocalypses: Super-strong zombies come out of the ground. They're fast and powerful.

You can configure the mod using the M-Values editor in your pause button (it looks like a witches' hat).

You can trigger a disaster using the `/spawn_natural_disaster` command.

**Disasters only start spawning after you run `/disaster_spawning true`!**
